metadata.author: PhysWorldLM Team
metadata.description: Blue logistics convoy transporting fuel, ammunition and supplies through a mountain valley is ambushed by a Red insurgent force using IEDs, ATGMs, mortars, loitering munitions and UAV reconnaissance. Blue responds with organic escort, UAV ISR, attack helicopter and CAS. Ground warfare flagship benchmark exercising all land-domain schemas.

entities.name: Convoy Commander Vehicle
entities.label: DARKSTAR-6
entities.description: MRAP command variant. Convoy commander with secure comms and blue force tracking.

entities.name: Fuel Tanker
entities.label: SUPPLY-1
entities.description: M978 HEMTT fuel tanker carrying 9500L of F-54 diesel.

entities.name: Ammunition Truck
entities.label: SUPPLY-2
entities.description: M977 HEMTT ammunition carrier.

entities.name: Cargo Truck
entities.label: SUPPLY-3
entities.description: M1083 FMTV cargo truck, general supplies.

entities.name: Medical Evacuation Vehicle
entities.label: MEDEVAC-1
entities.description: M997 HMMWV ambulance with medical crew and supplies.

entities.name: Recovery Vehicle
entities.label: WRECKER-1
entities.description: M984 HEMTT wrecker for vehicle recovery.

entities.name: MRAP Lead Escort
entities.label: IRON GUARD-1
entities.description: M-ATV MRAP, convoy lead security vehicle.

entities.name: MRAP Rear Escort
entities.label: IRON GUARD-2
entities.description: M-ATV MRAP, rear security vehicle.

entities.name: APC Infantry Carrier
entities.label: IRON GUARD-3
entities.description: M113A3 APC carrying dismounted infantry squad.

entities.name: Infantry Fighting Vehicle
entities.label: IRON GUARD-4
entities.description: M2A3 Bradley IFV providing fire support and troop lift.

entities.name: M1A2 SEPv3 Tank
entities.label: IRON GUARD-5
entities.description: M1A2 SEPv3 Abrams providing heavy fire support for convoy.

entities.name: Alpha Infantry Squad
entities.label: ALPHA SQUAD
entities.description: Nine-man dismounted infantry squad. Mounted in APC until ambush.

entities.name: Bravo Infantry Squad
entities.label: BRAVO SQUAD
entities.description: Second nine-man dismounted infantry squad with ATGM and sniper.

entities.name: RQ-7B Shadow Recon UAV
entities.label: EYE IN SKY-1
entities.description: RQ-7B Shadow tactical UAV providing persistent ISR over convoy route.

entities.name: MQ-1C Gray Eagle Attack UAV
entities.label: EYE IN SKY-2
entities.description: MQ-1C Gray Eagle armed UAV with Hellfire missiles and Lynx SAR.

entities.name: AH-64E Apache Attack Helicopter
entities.label: VIPER-1
entities.description: AH-64E Apache Guardian providing close air support. On alert at FOB Kestrel.

entities.name: A-10C Thunderbolt II
entities.label: HAMMER-1
entities.description: A-10C Warthog CAS aircraft on alert. Carries Maverick, GBU-12 and 30mm GAU-8.

entities.name: Red Recon Quadrotor
entities.label: SHADOW-UAV
entities.description: Commercial-derived quadrotor UAV modified for reconnaissance. Used to detect convoy.

entities.name: Red Scout Observer Team
entities.label: SHADOW-GROUND
entities.description: Two-man observation team conducting ground surveillance on ridgeline.

entities.name: Red ATGM Team
entities.label: HAMMER-RED-ATGM
entities.description: Four-man insurgent ATGM team with 9M113 Konkurs launcher in hull-down position on ridge.

entities.name: Red 82mm Mortar Team
entities.label: HAMMER-RED-MORTAR
entities.description: Four-man insurgent mortar team with 82mm M37 in defilade behind ridge.

entities.name: Red Sniper Pair
entities.label: SHADOW-SNIPER
entities.description: Two-man insurgent sniper team with Dragunov SVD. Targeting vehicle commanders.

entities.name: Red PKM Machine Gun Team
entities.label: WOLF-MG
entities.description: Three-man insurgent PKM machine gun team providing suppressive fire from rock formation.

entities.name: Main Road IED
entities.label: IED-ALPHA
entities.description: 100kg ANFO IED buried under road surface at kilometer 12. Command-wire detonation.

entities.name: Bridge Approach IED
entities.label: IED-BRAVO
entities.description: 60kg IED emplaced at bridge approach. Radio-controlled detonation.

entities.name: Shahed-136 Loitering Munition
entities.label: VIPER-LM1
entities.description: Shahed-136 one-way attack drone targeting fuel and ammunition trucks.

entities.name: Shahed-136 Loitering Munition #2
entities.label: VIPER-LM2
entities.description: Second Shahed-136 targeting IFV or APC.

entities.name: Red Pickup Truck #1
entities.label: WOLF-1
entities.description: Toyota Hilux pickup truck with PKM ground mount. Rapid-reaction vehicle.

entities.name: Red Pickup Truck #2
entities.label: WOLF-2
entities.description: Toyota Hilux with DShK 12.7mm heavy machine gun mount.

entities.name: Red Motorcycle Courier
entities.label: SHADOW-MOTO
entities.description: Honda 125cc motorcycle used for fast command communication and escaping.

entities.name: Red Command Pickup
entities.label: GHOST-6
entities.description: Red force commander vehicle with Thuraya satellite phone and VHF radio.

missions.name: Convoy Escort to FOB Kestrel
missions.primary_objective: Transport fuel, ammunition and supplies to FOB Kestrel uninterrupted
secondary_objectives: Maintain convoy integrity with at least 80% of vehicles
missions.roe: Return fire authorized. Escalation of force procedures apply.

missions.name: Convoy Route ISR
missions.primary_objective: Persistent ISR coverage of convoy route 15km ahead of lead vehicle
secondary_objectives: Provide early warning to convoy commander

missions.name: Close Air Support On Call
missions.primary_objective: Provide immediate CAS on request from convoy commander
missions.roe: Positive identification required. Minimize collateral damage.

missions.name: Operation Ghost Sting
missions.primary_objective: Destroy convoy and prevent supplies reaching FOB Kestrel
secondary_objectives: Destroy fuel tanker and ammunition truck
missions.roe: Attack all Blue military vehicles. Avoid civilian infrastructure.

events.notes: Convoy departs FOB. All Blue units active.
T+12min: RQ-7B Shadow launched for route ISR.
T+18min: Red UAV detects and classifies convoy. Coordinates relayed to ambush commander.
T+24min: Main road IED detonates under lead MRAP. Convoy halts.
T+25min: Red MG teams open fire. Ambush initiated.
T+26min: ATGM engages Blue APC. Hit amidships, crew casualty.
T+27min: 82mm mortar barrage on convoy halt point.
T+32min: Blue UAV thermal sensor locates mortar team heat signature. CAS requested.
T+34min: Shahed-136 launched against fuel tanker.
T+36min: AH-64E Apache scrambled from FOB Kestrel.
T+37min: Convoy commander broadcasts 9-line CAS request.
T+44min: Apache fires Hellfire Longbow x2 at mortar team. Mortar team destroyed.
T+48min: A-10C strafes Red technical vehicle with GAU-8.
T+50min: Red commander orders withdrawal. Surviving Red units disperse.
T+52min: MEDEVAC treats and evacuates casualties from APC crew.
T+55min: Convoy reorganizes and resumes movement to FOB Kestrel.
T+64min: Convoy reaches FOB Kestrel. Mission complete.
